I am also facing the same issue. Could you please share the solution if you have resolved it?

Regards, Ashwath

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Integration Suite - New Message Metrics
entry.content:
What about Process Direct. That is not counted or is that wrong.

Iflow 1) send a sync message to iflow 2)  via Process Direct. Iflow 2 then sends the message via HTTP. 

 

Daniel

entry.title: Re: Power BI Template Connection
entry.content:
Hi Natalie,

It's hard to know what is causing the issue without more information, but two options are:

1. Something on your network is blocking the communication between Power BI and your Manager server.  You can get your IT team to take a look and see if they can identify an issue
2. You are not turned on tracking in SAP Companion so there is no data to display in the dashboard.  Make sure that you have set the following parameter in your SAP Companion configuration:

trackingUrlSEN=https://[companyname].enable-now.cloud.sap/wa/[WorkareaID]/

You need to replace [companyname] with the name from your SAP Enable Now URL and [WorkareaID] with the ID of the Workarea that contains your SAP Companion content.

Hope that helps.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: SF Employee Central Contingent Worker End Date error
entry.content:
Hi,

SAP has agreed to resolve the defect as the issue is reported by other clients as well. We are awaiting fix from SAP.

Thank you!

entry.title: How to enable an OData V4 service for anonymous access?
entry.content:
Introduction

This requirement stems from a customer that asked how to publish an OData V4 service in an SAP S/4HANA on premise system such that it could be used on a public web site without the need to provide any authentication.

With OData V2 this requirement can be achieved more easily since here every service has it's own SICF node where it would be possible to store credentials just for this service.

In OData V4 we have only one SICF node, namely /sap/opu/odata4/.

This is obviously a problem since there is no service specific node available in SICF.

Solution

The problem can be solved using the following approach.

  1. Create a role that only contains the S_START authorization for the one single OData V4 service we want to publish , 
    help.sap.com/doc/saphelp_nw75/7.5.5/de-DE/c6/dd838722ce4b8d9cc4a0741d93d864/frameset.htm
  2. Create a technical user that has only the authorization to access the single OData V4 service we want to make accessible.
  3. Create an alias in SICF for the node /sap/opu/odata4/ 
  4. Store the credentials of the aforementioned user in the alias
  5. Test the service  

Result

As we can see accessing the service zrap630ui_shop_o4_05a via the alias zodatav4 works.

https://10.79.21.221:44301/sap/opu/zodatav4/sap/zrap630ui_shop_o4_05a/srvd/sap/zrap630ui_shop_o4_05a/0001/?sap-client=100

Whereas accessing a second OData V4 service zrap630ui_shop_o4_05b via the alias zodatav4 does NOT work

This has been achieved by assigne the follwoing role the technical user which only contains the authorization to start the first service based on the authorization object S_START.

Please note:
Since OData V4 service use the authorization object S_START which is based on the service name it would for example be possible to publish several services that are in the same name range like

zrap630ui_shop_o4_05A, zrap630ui_shop_o4_05B, ... zrap630ui_shop_o4_05Z,  

How to section

Create the role

Using PFCG and the role template /IWBEP/RT_MGW_USR we create a role as shown in the screen shot above that only contains the S_START authorization of one OData V4 service called ZRAP630UI_SHOP_O4_05A.

Create the user

As a user we create a technical user whose credentials will be stored in the system alias.

Create the system alias

1. We start by right-clicking on the node opu and choose New subelement.

2. We create a new service element called ZODATAV4_2 and choose the option Alias to an existing service.

3. We choose the tab Target, select the node OdataV4 by double-clicking on it.

4. We navigate to the tab Logon Data, choose Alternative Logon Procedure and enter the credentials of our service user.

5. We navigate down and remove all logon procedures beside Logon using service data.

6. Do not forget to activate the link in SICF.

7. Check the result

entry.title: Is it possible to change the format of a dynamic parameter?
entry.content:
I am using a parameter that refers to a field that returns the options as:

which is the year month day in a decimal format.  Is there a way to convert these to month day year or at least in a more user friendly fashion?

entry.title: plateau report designer Resource explorer missing
entry.content:
Hi,
I am designing a report using PRD. one of the steps as per a guide is to add report parameters through 'Resources Explorer. I don't see this tab. How do I enable this tab ?
Thank you

entry.title: Different SAP Data Services versions for UAT and PROD environment feasibility
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Current we are using a separate Product key for SAP Data Services for UAT and PROD environment. As we have SAP data service 4.2 for PROD and SAP data service 4.3 for UAT .Due to the downtime complications, we are unable to upgrade our PROD instance to SAP data service 4.3

We want to verify if it is feasible to keep two different Product Keys one for UAT testing and other for PROD environment.

Also, confirm even if the same is feasible, there will be no compliance issue for the same.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Different SAP Data Services versions for UAT and PROD...
entry.content:
The recommended way is to have both your lower environment and production environment on the exact same versions of the applications installed.

If you dont have same version, then in case if you have any issues happening in production environment , we cannot test it in your lower environment first and we will need to directly modify the production environment for eg. if the fix is released in the patch upgrade then you would need to directly apply the patch upgrade without testing it in lower environment first which may have unforeseen issues.

Also, Data Services 4.2 has End of Mainstream Support in May 31, 2023 and End of Priority 1 Support in Dec 2024. Which means by from next year , if any issues happen in your production environment, you will not be able to create a P1 ticket for your issue. Note- You can still create P2, P3, P4 priority ticket.

There is no other compliance issue for having different versions/product keys of Data Services.

entry.title: Re: UI Configuration for Standard Validation Rules - H1 2021
entry.content:
Hi @FabriceB ,

No unfortunately the rules configured will apply to both the worksheets and Executive Review.

Thanks,

Christian

entry.title: Job and Automation Monitoring features - SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
SAP Cloud ALM is an out-of-box, native cloud solution which serves as the central hub for managing SAP landscapes, offering guided implementation driven by content and highly automated operations. In this blog post, I aim to delve into a very crucial capability of cloud ALM: Job and Automation Monitoring.

Through Job and Automation monitoring within SAP Cloud ALM, it is possible to monitor SAP S/4 HANA Application jobs, SAP ABAP jobs, SAP BW Process Chains, SAP Build Process Automation Jobs(or SAP Intelligent RPA jobs) and SAP Business workflow and Job scheduler service jobs in customer BTP application.

Job & Automation Monitoring guarantees uninterrupted business operations while enhancing the quality and performance of business process execution. This is achieved through:

  • Monitoring the health of job executions and detecting anomalies during execution.
  • Promptly alerting both business and IT users about disruptions and exceptions.
  • Providing detailed insights at the job execution level to facilitate fact-based root cause analysis.
  • Minimizing configuration efforts by leveraging historical execution information.

 

Having recently implemented Job and Automation Monitoring, I'm excited to outline its standout features that make it exceptionally useful.

  1. Overview – Overview provides a summary status regarding job execution for the Managed Components. It shows the status of the latest execution of every job with regards to the Technical exceptions, Application exceptions and run time. It also displays the number of unconfirmed alerts and status events.

   

Clicking on a card takes us to the Monitoring view which shows the list of jobs and automations with their latest Execution status, Application Status, Start delay and runtime.

Rating rules are visible in Configuration section under Monitoring Rating Rules. Execution Status and Application Status are non-modifiable, but Start Delay and Run Time can be modified as per requirement.

 

Clicking on the job name allows to further drill down to the list of executions of the selected job. Additionally, clicking on the information icon provides further details and enables direct navigation to the job within the managed component by selecting the Run ID.

 

2. Data collection – Data collection offers a convenient feature to toggle the Collection of data for managed Objects. Within the configuration section, under Managed components, there is an option to Switch On or Off the data collection for managed components.

 

3. Heart Beat Status – This feature visualizes the heartbeat status of managed services. Within the configuration section, under Managed Components, users can view the heartbeat status. If there is no data collection, a red-light indicator will be displayed.

 

4. Alerting – Alerting in cloud ALM allows to configure alerts and notifications based on the status of job executions within the managed components. Alerts can be set up for various events, such as execution status, application status, runtime, or start delay, ensuring timely awareness and proactive management of the system.

 

Event Name in the alert can be adjusted to indicate the type of the alert for which event has been created.

 

Execution status rating for the event can also be chosen while setting up the event.

 

There is another recently introduced feature “At Every Occurrence”. Normally, consecutive job failures prompt just one notification until the alert is acknowledged. However, this new option allows users to receive alerts for each individual instance of job failure.

 

Recipients for email notifications can be maintained in Event Actions under “Send email to” section. Email IDs need to be maintained in the “Notification Management” application.

 

Job and automation monitoring deliver an enriched notification email:

  • Subject Line: The event name is augmented with the corresponding job name.
  • Content: Detailed information regarding the failed job execution is provided. Additionally, the email body contains a direct hyperlink to the alert, facilitating immediate access to the alert within Cloud ALM.

 

5. Integration with Business Service Management(BSM) – Within the Business Service Management application in SAP Cloud ALM for operations, we can see business services, manage assigned cloud services and technical systems, and handle associated events. To view status events such as maintenance, disruption, upgrade etc. In the homepage Overview tab, there is an option to view the status of event for the managed components. Events are maintained in Business Service Management application.

 

6. Analytics – The Analysis view allows users to pinpoint jobs with extended response times and highest number of exceptions. For any job it shows aggregated information on total and average run time, number of executions and number of failed executions and the resulting failure rate. By clicking on the arrow at the end of every line, we can drill down into various trend charts for the metrics.

 

Hope this blog post helps you in understanding the various features of Job and Automation monitoring in cloud ALM.

Please share your feedback and queries.

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP hybrid testing getting 'ECONNRESET' error whe...
entry.content: hey shahbhat, have you been able to resolve this problem?

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to change the format of a dynamic para...
entry.content:
Hi David5111, there are different options for this depending on what you want the prompt to look like.

If you want to use a calendar based prompt:

  1. On your report create a new Parameter which has a Date Type.
  2. Then in your Record Selection Formula add something like the following.
{your date field} = year({?your date param})*10000+month({?your date param})*100+day({?your date param})

entry.title: Re: Create an xP&A Business Flow with SAP Analytics Cloud, SAP Datasphere & SAP Cloud Integr

I'm wondering if Generic SFTP connection in SAP Datasphere could be used directly then it could allow to save data directly to a local table in SAP Datasphere. 

Regards,
Tuncay

entry.title: Negative budget transfer restriction in funds management
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are using FM-BCS in S/4 HANA 2021.We are using 7 dimensions(Fund, Fund center, Commitment item, Funded program, Budget period, functional area and grant)for budget posting and actuals.

We are using 3 budgetary ledgers for budget posting (Z1,Z2,Z3).Through budgeting workbench Z3 ledger consumes the Z2 ledger budget and Z2 ledger consumes the Z1 ledger budget. From Z3 ledger available balance the commitment and actual postings(PR/PO/IR) is triggering.

While transferring the budget from one budget address to another budget address system is not checking the sender budget and allowing to post the amount more than available amount. We have tried with FM budget consistency check and it is not working as expected.

Your help will be deeply appreciated.

Regards,

Syed Saleem Asifan.

entry.title: SAP Ariba Rest APIs: Gain a comprehensive understanding of rate limits!
entry.content:
SAP Ariba offers various REST APIs that enables developers to integrate their applications with SAP Ariba's robust procurement and supply chain management capabilities. In this article, we will delve into a crucial aspect of utilizing SAP Ariba REST APIs: rate limits. We will explore what rate limits are, how to find them, and how to leverage them to develop in a scalable manner.

Understanding Rate Limits

Rate limits define the maximum number of API requests an application can make within a specified time frame, typically expressed as a number of requests per second, minute, hour, and day. These limits are crucial in ensuring fair usage and preventing abuse, as well as maintaining optimal performance for all customers of the SAP Ariba REST API gateway. By adhering to rate limits, developers can design scalable applications that efficiently interact with SAP Ariba's system, mitigating the risk of overwhelming server resources or negatively impacting user experience.

Discovering Rate Limits

To develop effectively using the SAP Ariba REST APIs, it is essential to comprehend the rate limits imposed by the platform. These limits are typically documented in SAP Ariba's API documentation, which provides detailed information on various endpoints, methods, and associated rate limits. SAP Ariba categorizes its API endpoints into different groups, such as Authentication, Master Data, Transactions and Reporting. Each category may have its rate limits, which can vary based on the API endpoint's complexity and resource requirements.

For example, Analytical Reporting – Job Submission API has rate limit as 1/second, 2/minute, 8/hour, and 40/day.

Another example - Document Approval API has rate limit as 300/second, 800/minute, 35000/hour

By understanding and considering these rate limits during the development process, developers can ensure their applications meet the necessary performance criteria while avoiding disruption due to exceeded limits.

Rate Limit Management

To effectively utilize rate limits, developers must implement proper rate limit management strategies. Here are some best practices to consider:

  1. Respect Rate Limits: Always respect the rate limits set by SAP Ariba. Excessive API requests can result in rate limit exceedances or degraded performance. By being mindful of the limits imposed, developers can maintain the integrity of their applications.
  2. Use pagination and filtering: SAP Ariba REST APIs often support pagination and filtering options to limit result sets and reduce the amount of data transferred. Utilize these options effectively to improve performance and minimize resource usage.
  3. Implement error handling: Handle errors gracefully by capturing and interpreting response codes and error messages from SAP Ariba REST APIs. Implement appropriate error-handling logic to handle failures and provide meaningful feedback to the user.
  4. Monitor API usage: To ensure your application stays within rate limits, it is important to monitor your API usage. The response of each API call includes headers that contain the available rate limits for the specific endpoint. For instance, refer to the screenshot below that displays the remaining rate limits for the Analytical Reporting API endpoint - Job Results.  To Learn more about these headers, visit SAP Ariba help documentation
  5. Stay up to date with API changes: Keep track of any updates or changes to the SAP Ariba API and evaluate their impact on your integration. Regularly review SAP Ariba's release notes and documentation to ensure compatibility with the latest REST API versions.
  6. Consider storing data centrally to meet multiple use cases: If your organization has the requirement to use the same data for multiple integrations, it is recommended to pull it from SAP Ariba once, updating a central DB, and using that DB to connect to each downstream application. This will allow for exponential scalability and mitigate any performance related concerns. For example, check out mission "Extract SAP Ariba Cloud Services data through standard APIs" in SAP Discovery Center that pulls business related procurement data from SAP Ariba and stores it in a central database in BTP! 
  7. Leverage SAP API Management for Proxification, Governance, and Traffic Management and Monitoring. https://help.sap.com/docs/integration-suite/sap-integration-suite/api-management-capability

Conclusion: Overall, SAP Ariba open API enables businesses to extend the functionality of SAP Ariba and integrate it with other systems, fostering collaboration, automating processes, and enhancing procurement efficiency.

entry.title: Add attribute Account assignment group by customer like field on market segment report
entry.content:
Hi,

I would need to add Account assignment group by customer as a field in the market segment report so that I can be able to filter the data based on this characteristic.

I can add  Account assignment group by customer field as attribute from sales order field, but in this way i can't use this information to filter data.

 

Regards

entry.title: ChainVerifier: EC signed SHA256withRSA server certificate server certificate not capable for..
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I am facing the following issue with establishing a connection using a RestReceiver. Unfortunately, there is an issue with the certificate. The following error is appearing:

ChainVerifier: EC signed SHA256withRSA server certificate server certificate not capable for ECDHE_ECDSA key exchange algorithm!

ChainVerifier: EC signed SHA256withRSA server certificate server certificate not capable for ECDHE_ECDSA key exchange algorithm!

There is an SAP note regarding this matter. It explains:

"Contact the administrators of the target server to create a certificate signed with the ECDSA encryption algorithm." 

3057117 - Peer-Zertifikat von ChainVerifier abgelehnt - EC-signiertes SHA256withRSA-Serverzertifikat Serverzertifikat nicht für ECDHE_ECDSA-Schlüsselaustauschalgorithmus geeignet! - SAP for Me

However, are there any other solutions available?

On the internet, it is mentioned that it is indeed possible to use a SHA256withRSA signature with the ECDHE_ECDSA key exchange algorithm.

Do you have any insights?
I would greatly appreciate your input.

Best Regards,
Mohammad

entry.title: Re: Unified Analytics with SAP Datasphere & Databricks Lakehouse Platform- Data Federation Scenarios
entry.content:
Hi  @marcelo_bruno  thanks for your feedback. I still see this as error with SQL sent to Databricks. Did you get additional logs? I would go with what @yaw_mak2  said about the parameter UseNativeQuery = 0.  This means "The connector transforms the queries emitted by applications and converts
them into an equivalent form in HiveQL". Did you already use it in your JDBC URL?

entry.title: BTP Trial Account - Cannot access ABAP Cloud project via ADT after SAP Build Booster
entry.content:
Hi, 

In my BTP trial account, I subscribed for SAP Build through booster and now I cannot log into my account using Eclipse. I am getting following error message - 

Error while logging on to the service instance using this project. Please make sure that you are logging on with <user_email> (<id>). 

I am searching online but I cannot understand why this is happening. Any help is appreciated.

Regards

ASM

entry.title: Re: Upload CSV to CRM Calendar
entry.content: As for your specific scenario, here's a general roadmap you could follow: Data Formatting: Ensure your Excel file is properly formatted with columns for dates and meeting details. Conversion to iCal: Use a script or tool to convert your Excel data into iCal format. This step might require some scripting or finding a suitable tool online. Upload Functionality: Implement a feature in your CRM Web UI to allow users to upload their iCal files.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
David,

Hello,

I'm a fresh face in the SAP community, having recently concluded a 22-year tenure with the U.S. Army. Transitioning into civilian life, I'm enthusiastic about embarking on a new career path within the realm of SAP. I've observed numerous colleagues make strides in their careers after engaging with SAP programs, and I'm eager to follow suit. With a background in Engineering and Military Intelligence, I recognize the significance of SAP and its contributions to the DoD enterprise. I'm keen to contribute to and be a part of this dynamic environment. I am interested in participating in the digital skills initiative. 

Kind regards,

Jamel J

entry.title: Re: RSL issue in MB5M
entry.content: Hello Arjuna, I am having the same issue on a part that i set the total SL for and let SAP calculate the actual SLED. Even though i am manually entering most of the SLEDs, i still need the rounding rule se to the end of the month due to an evaluation check be active at the point of shipping. Without this it blocks orders from posting as soon as the RSL month hits. But we can still ship the material up until the end of the RSL month.

entry.title: Re: RAP vs CAP - Key Differences between the Two Programming Models
entry.content:
Hi @Raja - Came across this blog and thought of asking you the below question:-

  • Since BTP offers ABAP Environment(for RAP), CAP and also BAS for building Fiori, what is the recommended approach in developemnt for a customer who is on BTP?

entry.title: SAPCC 2205.0: Java Heapspace error while removing member from usergroup
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have 300k members in b2busergroup. when I try to remove a member from the group using DefaultB2BCommerceB2BUserGroupService.removeMemberFromUserGroup(), I am getting out of memory error. The below code is not written effectively to handle such a huge number of members. 

 

protected void removeMemberFromUserGroup(final B2BUserGroupModel usergroup, final B2BCustomerModel user)
{
	final HashSet<PrincipalModel> members = new HashSet<>(usergroup.getMembers());
	members.remove(user);
	usergroup.setMembers(members);
}

 

my analysis shows that if the user that I need to remove it in the last positions in the members set, then members.remove(user) is taking a longer time, because internally it queries the user table too many times. For example, if the user to be removed is at the 250000th position then I can see select * from users where PK = ? query getting executed 250,000 times. 

Is there a better way to Add/remove members into a user group?

Thanks,

Jobin

entry.title: Copy ST03N data with program in the SAP note 2568739 failed with error "Error in Control Framework"
entry.content:
We applied the note 2568739 as well as the Zreport in the note, however when running the program in the background job mode it failed with error:

Job started   
Step 001 started (program ZTMW_RC_MANAGE_ST03N_DATA, variant &0000000000000, user ID xxx ) 
Object ZTMW_RC_MANAGE_ST03N_DATA of class RE and language EN does not exist.   
Error in Control Framework      FES          022          E
Job canceled after system exception ERROR_MESSAGE   


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Copy ST03N data with program in the SAP note 2568739...
entry.content:
SAP Gui function GUI_UPLOAD/GUI_DOWNLOAD will be called in the program and lead to this error.
It is not allowed to run the report in background job mode, please run it in dialog mode.

Please refer to the KB 0003263260 Error in Control Framework Message no. FES022 when downloading or uploading data from SAP GUI through GUI_UPLOAD/GUI_DOWNLOAD Function Modules

entry.title: SFG Batch To FG Yield
entry.content:
Hello,

Lets say for example, a SFG PO has 6 batches ( 6 vats). Each batch is unique. When packing the SFG Batches against the FG PO, the FG PO will have only one batch. I'm wondering if there is a way SAP could show the FG yield for each individual SFG Batch. I can run SQL report for ea's produced per vat get yield per vat via MES data. However, I'm looking for a report a way this could be accomplished in SAP.  Documented goods movement visible via COR 3 for the SFG PO will show the volume used for each SFG Batch, however the FG PO's documented goods movement will only show the ea's for each HU produced all in a row.

any suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

thanks !

entry.title: Re: Service Layer - Linking Stages on Marketing Documents
entry.content:
Hi costas_ioannou2,

Unfortunately, this option is not available via DI or Service Layer as of now.

SAP Business One uses the Customer Influence site https://influence.sap.com/go/SAPBusinessOne for collecting, tracking, and prioritizing of requirements.

Please see and follow the recommendations in SAP Note 1028874, section B to post your requirement in SAP Business One Customer Influence site.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: What to do when you forget to click 'Without Qty Posting' on a credit?
entry.content: What is the easiest way to rectify this omission?  We didn't want to return the stock, only wanted to provide a partial credit for an incorrect price.

entry.title: How to set logic validation, when supplier invoice is reverse in the app 'Supplier invoice list'
entry.content:
We would like to set validation logic to check value of custom table when we reverse supplier invoice. 

We found there is not app for manage validation for supplier invoice reverse and could not find extension point id(BAdI) for it.

How to set logic validation, when supplier invoice is reverse in the app 'Supplier invoice list'?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to set logic validation, when supplier invoice is...
entry.content:
BADI MRM_CHECK_INVOICE_CLOUD can be used to perform customer specific checks of header and item data when creating supplier invoice. When you reverse a supplier invoice it also can be called and perform custom check.

But please note when you create supplier invoice the BADI is also triggered to ensuring that the invoice created will always meet your validation criteria. So I understand there should be no need to check it again when reversing invoice.

You can refer to this online documentation about all available BADI in supplier invoice for your information:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0e602d466b99490187fcbb30d1dc897c/5a27c5f57c3f4dffa6881ca587b22571.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: AI-related projects in your company
entry.content:
Hi There,

We are doing some exploration for SAP AI, there are some function can be realized like generate a simple report by typing in chatbox to describe. 

Also can do some knowledge search according to the files we upload.

but some customizing program it's impossible to read/change....so this is not very useful for senior consultant or in complex scenario

entry.title: Managing SCORM access with limited licenses
entry.content:
Due to some legacy licensing framework, a handful of our SCORM objects are on a usage/ license model. i.e. our organization is licensed to use a SCORM object for up to X number of course completions. Usage exceeding that will require additional fees to the content creator.

Currently, I can only think of scheduling reports for such item on regular basis to monitor the usage level.

I wonder if there is a more automatied/ sustainable way of managing? For example, is there a function in LMS that can manage the number of course completions for an Item (Online) containing such SCORM objects? 

SAP SuccessFactors Learning

entry.title: Re: Connector Builder Guide – Authentication Type: Custom
entry.content: Thanks, This is helpful to me.

entry.title: Re: MRP created multiple PR For Material Which Has Existi...
entry.content: Please first check the PO quantity is taken as the available Qty or not.  If the PO Qty is not taken as the available Qty, then MRP will generate new supply.

entry.title: Multiple Instructors in Instructor-led Training and Virtual Learning Session
entry.content:
SAP SuccessFactors Learning

I found 2 old posts in the archive about multiple instructors for Instructor-led Training aka Item (Scheduled) and Virtual Learning Session. 

I have the same questions and found this documentation: Implementing Instructor Tracking and the Instructor Dashboard

It seems there is now capability to add a secondary instructor for each segment? Could anyone share your experience is using the secondary instructor function?

For VLS, if secondary instructor is also possible, would the secondary instructor have the same Teams role as the primary instructor? In particular: 

  1. white boards
  2. breakout rooms
  3. Process VLS Attendance i.e. By default LMS takes the time between when the primary instructor launched and ended it. In the absence of the primary instructor for one or multiple segments, will the system use the time between when the secondary instructor launched and ended it as an alternative data point.

 

In addition, assuming multiple instructors can be added now, is there a way such that at the course evaluation, feedback can be given to individual instructors, rather than generic question that is applicable to all instructors involved?

entry.title: Re: How to Plan Bom item before FERT for MTO scenario
entry.content:
Hi,

You can use strategy 50 for MTO scenario.

You can test the below steps to verify if your requirement is met

Master data

Set strategy 50 at FG level, and collective indicator as 2 at SFG levels.

Transactions

Maintain PIR for FG, requirement type will be VSE.

Before Sales order

Execute MRP run, then planned order will be generated for FG with order type VP which cannot be convertible. Dependent requirement for the planned order will be passed to SFGs where those SFG planned orders can be converted to production order and complete the production process there.

After sales order

Execute MRP run, new planned order will be generated for FG referring to the sales order line item qty (MTO). This planned order can be converted to a production order.

 PIR and VP planned order will be consumed by the convertible planned order quantity.

PIR will get reduced once PGI done to Sales order.

entry.title: Re: Integration Suite - Provisioning and Upgrading a Free Tier Tenant
entry.content: Integration Suite under free-tier is a trial that ends in 90 days. Will I be able to create a new subscription to free-tier Integration Suite, when the initial 90 days trial ends?

entry.title: Re: Integration Suite is not available for subscription i...
entry.content:
This above behaviour is due to Directory!
I have my sub-accounts organised under a Directory. I had to add Integration Suite as an entitlements to the directory level first, and then assign it to one of the subaccounts.

Resolved!

Re: how to grey out "export" in SAC

Hi Experts,

Need your valuable opinion on below scenario,

Regards,

Amith

entry.title: Should we assign the Plant to the SL? Justify and if so, how do we do it?
entry.content:
The question is :
Should we assign the Plant to the SL? Justify and if so, how do we do it?
This is my answer ( I tried to translated from French to English)

There is a certain flexibility when we structure, each organizational element exists but does not need to be linked, we must assign it. If we want to use the storage location, we will have to assign it to the Plant. For example,
for the business function: Material requirements planning, if the product still arrives at the main plant and, due to storage constraints, is sent to a processing facility.
external storage, it is wise to create a storage location within the main plant (therefore assigning a Plant to the SL). Another example would be for Master Data Maintenance, a location of
Storage within a factory is a considerable advantage in limiting the creation of master data.

To assign the Plant to the SL, you must use transaction OX09.

Can you help me on this question plz?

entry.title: Re: Edge Integration Cell
entry.content:
Hi Joel,

Every SAP Integration Suite licensed tenant, regardless of whether they have the standard edition, premium edition, CPEA, or PAYG, receives one entitlement of Edge Integration Cell included. Therefore, if you already have an SAP Integration Suite subscription, you will have Edge Integration Cell available in your landscape.

Thanks,

Kasturi

entry.title: Re: Some of the transactions are taking more time from DB...
entry.content:
Hi 

1. Since it is Z-transaction, you have to enable the trace using the transaction code ST12 to find the expensive SQL statements based on the requirements you have to add the indexes in the z tables for this you can get help from Abaper and basis guys.

Refer to the link on how to enable the ST12 trace

https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-blog-posts/st12-trace-step-by-step-instruction-on-how-to-use-it-for-analysis/ba-p/13240660

2. Have you checked the memory buffer values? using the transaction code ST02

Regards

SS

Thanks

entry.title: How to assign a role pragmatically to a user in SAP BTP using SAP CAP?
entry.content: How to assign a role pragmatically to a user in SAP BTP using SAP CAP

entry.title: Linux: Preparing SLES 15 SPS 5 environments for SAP Installation
entry.content:
Dear Team,

 

Our plan is to build a new version of S4HANA. It supports sapconf when OS is SLES  , but Is there a way to install SAPTUNE package under SLES 15  ?

 

Regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Linux: Preparing SLES 15 SPS 5 environments for SAP I...
entry.content:
Yes, there are ways to conveniently install the SAPTUNE package under SLES 15. Here are the steps:

  1. First, you need to ensure you have the right subscription level with SUSE. Upgraded subscriptions come with additional modules, one of which being the SUSE Linux Enterprise Server for SAP Applications channel. SAPTUNE is included in this specific module.

  2. Once you have confirmed you have the right subscription, you can add the necessary modules by using following command:

    SUSEConnect -p sle-module-sap-applications/15.1/x86_64

    Note: Replace 15.1 with whatever version you're using.

  3. After adding the right module, you can proceed to install SAPTUNE. Enter the following command:

    zypper install saptune.

  4. You might need to restart the services in order for the changes to take effect.

Please note that for versions of SLES that are optimized for SAP (like SLES 15 for SAP), these tools are usually installed by default. If you are using standard SLES, you may have to manually install them as mentioned above. Moreover, please note that as of SLES15, SAPTUNE replaces SAPCONF, offering advantages over the older SAPCONF tool. It’s recommended to use SAPTUNE in most cases rather than SAPCONF.

entry.title: Calculation on the values from a single column in Web Intelligence(BOBI 4.3) report
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am developing a Webi report(4.3 SP3) and generating a cross table with 3 Dimensions at rows and 3 Dims at column(one of the Dim is BEx Structure) and one measure value in the body.

I need to generate a new column beside the cross table which has the calculation done on the values from the cross table. Please suggest on how to perform this. 

Thanks

entry.title: Instance Local Http Availability Showing False Alert
entry.content:
We are getting Application Instance Local Http Availability ping (https://<hostname>:<port>/sap/public/ping failed with rc 403 Error.

We checked below areas:

1. URL is already giving "Server Reached"

2. SDA log showing no error with the metric data collection.

3. We checked logs of managed system ICM even increased the trace level. But no error is showing.

We are still not sure why this metric is checking authentication at first place as this is only ping function.

How to resolve this issue?

Minky

entry.title: How to prevent creating warehouse tasks for some storage types
entry.content:
Hello Experts, I need to prevent creating warehouse tasks for some storage types by unauthorized users. 

Due to my tests, this authorization depends on the TOCR object.

However, these users still have permission to create warehouse tasks despite they do not have LGTY attributes of those storage types.

I do not have this problem in the QA system but exists in the Production system.

Waiting for your kind responses.

entry.title: Re: SAC Currency Conversion Add missing rates - but they...
entry.content:
@eric2357 

I am not able to see the the attached images but the setup would work like this. 

  • Make sure all accounts have proper Account Type assignment.
  • Make sure all accounts which you want to be in scope for currency conversion has currency and unit attribute set to currency.
  • If you define Rate Type for few Accounts as Average or Closing, then system looks for a valid Average and Closing rate and leaving it blank in Currency table will throw missing rate error.
  • If you have left rate type as blank for few accounts, then system looks for a blank rate Type rate in currency table and existing Average and Closing rates are not used and it will still throw an error of missing rates. So you need to add a blank Rate type rate for the currency in addition to Avg and Closing rate for the currency.

 

Nikhil

  •

Thanks

#SAPUI5

entry.title: Re: How to refresh an application screen using SAP iRPA -...
entry.content: Hello, the robot always needs to know which page it is working with. If the entire automation is within one try-catch block, it is possible to split it into multiple blocks and handle any errors for each, or by using Exists(Screen) to determine which page is open.

entry.title: Questions Regarding SAP Companion for Desktop
entry.content:
Hi,

I have been trying to explore the SAP Companion for Desktop feature within SAP Enable Now. I have some questions around it.

  1. How can I roll out SAP Companion for Desktop to End users? How can they access SAP Companion for Desktop from their machines without having to install SAP Enable Now? 
     
  2. What to do if an end user is not able to view a guided tour on a bigger monitor properly? The highlights and the hotspots appear misplaced when the guided tour is run on a bigger monitor. Is there a way to fix that? How can I record a guided tour whose resolution remains unaffected by the size of the screen it is run on? Is it possible to do that?
     
  3. How can I neutralise the data on a recorded guided tour to make the end user experience seamless? What pointers do I need to keep in mind? There are quite a few transactions that involve entering alphanumeric fields (Material number/PO, etc.). An end user cannot be expected to enter the exact same characters as entered in a recorded guided tour. What can I do to make learning for an end user hassle free? Can you please suggest ways around it?

  4. Also, would the guided tour be sensitive to the the SAP logon theme it is recorded on? I tested the guided tour I recorded using an old SAP logon theme with a user that had the Quartz theme of SAP logon selected. Some of the screen icons/elements were identifiable and some weren't. What do you suggest is a best practice here?

I understand these questions are lengthy. And I am asking a lot here. Request you to please provide a resolution as and when you can.

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Create DB table based on CDS's structure.
entry.content: @Raymond Hello, When sending a name of table to 'tabl_name' parameter in DD_TABL_GET function (line 14) and after calling 'DD_TABL_PUT' function ,then it creates a new table as excepted. But when sending a name of CDS to 'tabl_name' parameter (line 15), it creates a view. What should I change in the parameters , which are sent to 'DD_TABL_PUT',in order to receive a table (not a view)? I tried to add ls_dd02v-tabclass = 'TRANSP'. (line 44) , but it did not help.

entry.title: Re: Archiving Object - Entry missing in Customizing table...
entry.content:
Hi,

For those who come after this, "Customizing Settings" need to be created for the archiving object in AOBJ. The error message is not appearing after I did so.

Regards,

Cathy

entry.title: Re: WebUI in ChaRM - How to change field label?
entry.content:
Hi Sergey,

You can change the field label in the CRM UI itself. 

 

  1. Launch CRM Web UI [T-code SM_CRM/CRM_UI]
  2. Choose a relevant business role [Ex : SOLMANPRO]
  3. Open the document you want to change the field label for and click on the "Show configurable areas" button at the top right. If you're unable to see this button kindly check the KBA 2520279 - SAP CRM WebUI: Show Configurable areas/Configure page buttons are not showing up, to enable this button. 
  4. Once you click on the "Show configurable areas" button, click on the section where the field is added on the screen.
  5. The View configuration page opens up and a configuration layer is selected by default. 
  6. You can select the field you want to change the label for and click on the "Show Field properties" button. 
  7. You can directly edit the Field label here. 
  8. Save and apply the changes made. 

    Hope this helps. If this doesn't help change the field label and if you still have issues with editing the label, feel free to raise a case with CA-WUI-UI component area and we'll help check this further. 

    Best Regards, 
    Deepa
    SAP Product Support

entry.title: Re: Service Layer - Linking Stages on Marketing Documents
entry.content: Thank you for you prompt reply.

entry.title: ARTICLE ON AI ENGINEERING
entry.content:
AI Engineering has become an integral part of our life in both Professionally and Personally. Not only it is helping us in our day to day life but also it is the future of Technology as we all know about it.  I have learnt about AI engineering, the impact and importance of AI in our day to day lives and scope of future prospects. I have learnt about many topics like prompt engineering, fine tuning, lang chain algorithm, probabilistic and deterministic approach. I have got to know about different AI tools and their uses, ChatGPT3 and ChatGPT4 being among the popular used AI tools. I have learnt about the practical uses of the AI analysis and deterministic approach of AI.

Prompt engineering taught me how to provide the prompts to the AI and it will process and analyse the prompts and give us a definite solution. If I need to check like what is sap, I can easily get the definition and details of sap. If I need to find out what are the modules present in the sap, I can get the details like SAP ABAP, SAP MM, SAP FICO, etc.

Fine tuning taught me how to improve the performance of AI like faster computation, accurate results, and precise solutions. Basically, AI has become an integral part of our life which has definitely made our life and work both easier and approachable. Earlier, to get any information we had to think about how to follow the approach for the solution and result. But now with the extent of the AI tools, it has become very easy.

The lang chain is a major theoretical concept of AI. Lang chain is a type of framework which is basically an Open-source software which can develop applications based on large language models. By this we mean to say that it is generative type of concept. If I want to do any code analysis like analysing large codes having complex logic, at that time I can use the lang chain. Like if we are having a program of 5000 – 6000 lines, we can easily use the concept of lang chain model to find the solution like where is the error and how to resolve the error in the code logic.

Feature store is an important concept in AI engineering. It is mainly used to store the past data like the prompts and inputs which we provide to the ai interface. For example, if I have previously searched for vehicles, then this time before giving any prompt, it will display about the vehicles like cars and bikes to search for. Again, if I am selecting Cars, then I will get the names of the Brands like Mercedes Benz, Audi, BMW, etc. If I am selecting bikes, then it will show the options like Honda, Bajaj, Suzuki, etc. Basically, it will analyse the past data and generate new data based on history input given.

Model monitoring is a major topic in AI engineering. It mainly deals with deterministic approach and probabilistic approach. Deterministic approach mainly deals with the events which are destined to happen. In other words, we can say like these are certain to happen. For example, Sunday comes after Saturday. This is a deterministic event.

We cannot have Friday after Saturday. Likewise, whenever we are calculating or measuring the length and breadth of an object, it is already certain that its length is 10 cm or other. But this is not the same case with respect to the probabilistic approach. If I want to calculate distance between Bangalore and Chennai, it can be different for everyone depending on their perception.

One of the challenges I feel is that AI can lead to disruption of thinking power of people because people will not consider it necessary to think and analyse the code or concept, but they will instead login to ChatGPT and search for their required answers. In almost all the cases, people are indeed getting the generated answers which include the exact program logic which is required for a Developer to build an App. This in turn is hampering the thinking capability of an individual for problem solving and Root cause Analysis. Since, people are getting everything on ChatGPT, they are developing carefree attitude. This is surely going to affect the future generations in some way.

Another challenge is loss in future jobs as per the reports which we read daily in News and Blogs. The monotonous jobs in many sectors including IT industry which can be done by AI are being replaced by AI. This is certainly one of the reasons for many layoffs happening in the IT Industry due to Cost cutting and other factors.

There are Pros of using AI Engineering as well. AI can be used along with our work for our support as well which can certainly help us in some or the other way. We have also read in the news that AI can be used to upskill the present employees with Hands on Experience so that they can work on AI in present as well as Future. Hence, this is certainly going to create lakhs of new job opportunities for the future generation.

Basically, AI has become a part of our life and we must adapt it so that we are able to cope up with Working needs of the Future.

entry.title: Re: What to do when you forget to click 'Without Qty Post...
entry.content:
Hi,

Right click on the Credit Note, and choose Cancel from the menu. This will cancel the Credit Note. Then create a new Credit Note, this time with 'Without Qty Posting'.

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: chaRM functionality road map on Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

According to Transition to SAP Cloud ALM - SAP Solution Manager is in mainstream maintenance until the end of DIGITS. SAP Cloud ALM is the Go-to ALM platform for all SAP customers. SAP recommends to complete the transition to SAP Cloud ALM before this date 

We are using the chaRM in Solution Manager and would like to understand if CALM and support (or when) the same functionality as chaRM before we migrate the change management to CALM.

Can you provide us the link of comparison between chaRM and CALM? It would help customer to make the decision and plan ahead for migration before solution manager end of main stream date. 

We already checked the roadmap but could not find end-to-end process.

Thank you.

Regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: chaRM functionality road map on Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Dear customer, 

I would recommend you to use the tool: SAP Readiness Check for SAP Cloud ALM

This tool will analyze the scenario used in your SAP Solution Manager customers and tell you which of your used scenarios in SolMan are available/supported or planned or not in the CALM, and giving the transition project hints.

See this Blog post on SAP Readiness Check for SAP Cloud ALM 

Access the report via SAP for Me. 

Check SAP Note 3236443 - SAP Readiness Check for SAP Cloud ALM for details to extract the required data from yoru SAP Solution manager.

I would like to highlight also the presentations and recordings of the last ALM Summit EMEA 2023, get all the material in this link
https://support.sap.com/en/alm/sap-almsummit/sap-alm-summit-emea-2023-materials.html?sap-outbound-id=BB15CA9BEFBA63B6493D9B98CAE8008C3B83C5DE&smc_campaign_id=0000037414&source=email-smc

ChaRM functionality will be included in Implementation- Deployment scenario in SAP Cloud ALM.

Pay attention to session: What's in for You? Get the Latest Outlook for SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation

Hope this helps, 

Dolores Correa

SAP Support

entry.title: QA33 NO LAYOUTS FOUND
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

When I try to run the QA33 program a custom layout comes automatically and I get an error message called no layouts found. 

I know there is no such a layout among my layouts, may it come from custom code, but I want to use a standard layout here all the time to charm away this problem.

Do you have any idea about how can I delete the layout pointed out below from all users? 

Waiting for your kind responses.
